summary: Comprehensive testing of SAMANVAI Next.js app - Auth flow, Profile Selection, Dashboard, Suresh full journey, per-profile data isolation, life-situation intent detection, and sidebar buttons all working end-to-end. 15/15 backend pytest tests pass; UI flow reaches submission with valid SMV-PMKISAN-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX Reference ID.

minor.issue: Suresh persona seeds `paid_income_tax:false` and `is_govt_employee:false`, yet engine still asks these Yes/No questions during eligibility for PM-KISAN. Likely the engine treats boolean `false` as an unanswered value for boolean-eligibility keys. Adds 1-2 extra clicks vs the spec's promise of 'eligibility passes after Andhra Pradesh'.

Live persona seeds (`__persona:'Live Citizen'`, `__persona_scripted:false`) are never applied because default DB starts on `currentProfile:'live'` with empty facts, and later switch-to-live loads the existing (empty) bucket instead of applying personaSeeds. Functional impact is minimal (Live is unscripted anyway) but the __persona metadata is missing for the Live profile.

action_items: Optional: make engine treat explicit `false` boolean answers as 'answered' so Suresh's paid_income_tax=false and is_govt_employee=false persona seeds satisfy the eligibility check without asking again (spec says eligibility should pass after only 'Andhra Pradesh').
Optional: on switch-to-live, if bucket exists but facts are empty, seed with `personaSeeds.live` so the Live Citizen persona metadata is present.
critical_code_review_comments: components/samanvai/SamanvaiApp.tsx is 1246 lines and app/api/samanvai/route.ts is 1325 lines - both exceed the 700-line guideline and should be split into smaller modules (per-phase route handlers, per-view sidebar components).

Only 3 data-testid attributes across entire component (profile buttons, switch-profile-btn, back-to-portal-btn). Consider adding data-testid to Text/Voice Assistant tiles, chat input, suggestion chips, and sidebar nav items to make future testing more robust.

Login form (line 636-637) uses no name/id and no state binding for citizen ID / password - user input is discarded and any values are accepted. This is documented as intended demo behavior but a hidden field-less form is UX-fragile.
route.ts uses `crypto.randomUUID()` and JSON file store - fine for demo, but writeDb is not concurrency-safe (multiple parallel requests could clobber each other).

success_rate.frontend: 100% for core flow (auth, profile, dashboard, Suresh submission, isolation, switch-back)

seed_data_creation: None - persona seeds are applied by API automatically on first profile switch; /app/frontend/data/samanvai-db.json auto-regenerated with default state each time it is deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend runs via Next.js on port 3000 - only ONE API route: /api/samanvai (POST for message/profile/apply/status/reset; GET for state). Persona seeds live in route.ts:865-947. Reference IDs are in format SMV-<SCHEME>-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX. To reset DB: `rm /app/frontend/data/samanvai-db.json` then hit any endpoint. Session-based UI auth: sessionStorage keys gov-portal-authenticated, samanvai-pin-verified, samanvai-profile; localStorage key samanvai-language.
rca of the issue: Minor bug 1 (Suresh extra Y/N questions): In lib/samanvai/engine.ts eligibility loop, boolean questions likely check `facts[key] === undefined || facts[key] === '' || facts[key] === false` treating `false` as unanswered. Fix: differentiate between 'not set' vs 'explicitly false'. Minor bug 2 (Live persona metadata): route.ts:960 loads existing bucket without merging persona seeds; fix: if bucket.facts is empty, apply personaSeeds[profile].
